Operation 'createTag' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too generic and lacks actionable details. AI agents need to understand: what a tag is used for, authentication requirements, what inputs are needed, what the response contains, and when the tag becomes available. Enhanced version provides domain context (content organization), input expectations, output structure, and side effects (immediate availability).

data.current_description: GraphQL mutation for creating a new tag.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new tag for content organization
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new tag that can be applied to posts and content within the community. Requires authentication and appropriate permissions. Accepts tag name and optional description as inputs. Returns the created tag object with its ID, name, description, and metadata. Tags become immediately available for use across the platform.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and lacks actionable details. AI agents need to understand: what a tag is used for, authentication requirements, what inputs are needed, what the response contains, and when the tag becomes available. Enhanced version provides domain context (content organization), input expectations, output structure, and side effects (immediate availability).

message: Operation 'castVote' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Enhanced version clarifies: authentication requirement, poll state requirement (active), required inputs (poll ID, option ID), response content (updated poll with vote counts), and important side effect (vote replacement behavior). This helps agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: GraphQL mutation for casting a vote on a poll.
data.summary_suggestion: Submit a vote on a poll option
data.description_suggestion: Submits a vote from the authenticated member on a specified poll option. Requires authentication and the poll must be active. Accepts poll ID and option ID as inputs. Returns the updated poll object with current vote counts and the member's vote status. Replaces any previous vote from the same member on this poll.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. Enhanced version clarifies: authentication requirement, poll state requirement (active), required inputs (poll ID, option ID), response content (updated poll with vote counts), and important side effect (vote replacement behavior). This helps agents understand when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_description: GraphQL mutation for creating a moderation report for content.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a moderation report to flag content (posts, comments, or members) for review by community moderators. Requires authentication. Accepts content ID, content type, and reason for report as inputs. Returns the created report object with ID, status, timestamp, and submission confirmation. Reports are queued for moderator review and may trigger automated actions based on report reason and content history.
data.reasoning: Original description is insufficient for AI agent understanding. Enhanced version specifies: what can be reported (posts, comments, members), authentication requirement, required inputs (content ID, type, reason), response structure, and important side effects (moderator queue, potential automated actions). message: Operation 'loginNetwork' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary was vague ('Login to Network'). Enhanced summary uses domain-appropriate terminology. Description now includes input requirements (credentials), output details (Member Access Token), and important side effects (session establishment, token invalidation) critical for AI agents to understand authentication flow and token management.

data.current_summary: Authenticate user and obtain access token
data.current_description: GraphQL mutation for authenticating a user and obtaining an access token. Accepts member credentials (username/email and password) as input. Returns a Member Access Token that must be used for subsequent authenticated requests. This operation establishes a new session and invalidates any previous tokens for the same member.
data.reasoning: Original summary was vague ('Login to Network'). Enhanced summary uses domain-appropriate terminology. Description now includes input requirements (credentials), output details (Member Access Token), and important side effects (session establishment, token invalidation) critical for AI agents to understand authentication flow and token management.

message: Operation 'createDraftPost' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original description was too minimal.
